name: Rocky Mountain MicroFinance Institute
description_short: Rocky Mountain MicroFinance Institute is a free credit assistance provider based in Denver, Colorado. Rated 4.1/5 with 21 Google reviews, reflecting strong customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Rocky Mountain MicroFinance Institute is a free credit assistance provider serving clients in Denver, Colorado. Carrying a 4.1/5.0 Google rating from 21 reviews, Rocky Mountain MicroFinance Institute has an strong reputation among consumers in the Denver area looking to access free credit counseling and financial guidance.

Operating as a financial institution, business development service, Rocky Mountain MicroFinance Institute provides a range of services for consumers seeking free credit assistance solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Non-profit and free credit assistance providers in Denver offer valuable resources for consumers who need help but may not be able to afford paid services. Rocky Mountain MicroFinance Institute provides an important community service, and consumers should verify the organization's non-profit status and HUD-approval where applicable. Free counseling sessions can be a good starting point before committing to paid credit repair or debt relief programs.

Consumers in the Denver, Colorado area who are considering Rocky Mountain MicroFinance Institute should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any free credit assistance provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
